<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：In the management of refractory oedema associated with congestive cardiac failure; hepatic cirrhosis with ascites and oedema, malignant ascites, nephrotic syndrome, diagnosis and treatment of primary...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（99.3%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（99.0%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（98.4%）</li>
<li>alopecia（97.8%）</li>
<li>hypertensive disorder（97.8%）</li>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（97.5%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（97.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（97.3%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（97.3%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（96.6%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（95.5%）</li>
<li>Waterhouse-Friderichsen syndrome（85.6%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（84.0%）</li>
<li>acute pulmonary heart disease（81.2%）</li>
<li>pregnancy associated osteoporosis（78.6%）</li>
<li>Worth syndrome（75.8%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant neovascular inflammatory vitreoretinopathy（75.7%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（74.4%）</li>
<li>congestive heart failure（74.0%）</li>
<li>postmenopausal osteoporosis（73.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
